posts.text:
President Trump is making life more affordable for Americans everyday. 

Just like he promised.


Karoline Leavitt (@PressSec)

MUST WATCH video of President Trump discussing the two strong executive orders he recently signed to improve housing affordability:

"Under the Trump Administration, we want to make it possible for every American to live that American Dream in a beautiful home." - @POTUS 

🏡🇺🇸

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/PressSec/status/2034279874806870265#m

Democrats think voter ID is “despicable."

What's wrong with making sure only citizens vote in American elections?

Hours long TSA lines.

Families going without pay.

Now, even airline CEOs are demanding Democrats end their DHS shutdown.

A great way to honor Ohio’s brave fallen firefighters.

firerescue1.com/brotherhood/…

Stand for the flag.

Support our troops.

Be a proud American.

No proof of citizenship?

No ID?

No vote.

Pass the SAVE America Act.

It’s always worse than we thought. 

Jack Smith targeted the phone records of EVEN MORE Republican members of Congress.

How far did Jack Smith really go?

foxnews.com/politics/new-nam…

US committee demands Big Tech share comms with EU officials
politico.eu/article/us-congr…

Fairfax County prosecutor called to testify on sanctuary policies after Minter murder

wjla.com/news/local/stephani…

Protect our elections. 

Pass the SAVE America Act.

It’s common sense.

Protecting airports. 

Securing borders.

Ending drug trafficking.

That’s at risk during the Democrats’ DHS shutdown.

Praying for Susie Wiles as she undergoes treatment.

Susie is a fighter, patriot, and strong leader.

God bless her and her family.

Museums. 

Historic sites. 

National parks. 

Visit Ohio!
